title: The Last Block of Us
description: This mod adds a variety of items, weapons, mobs, and more inspired by the video game The Last of Us.
body:
The Last Block of Us is a Fabric mod designed to let you experience what it’s like to survive in a world where Clickers and other mobs from The Last of Us have invaded Minecraft — all while staying as true as possible to the spirit of vanilla Minecraft.

[THIS MOD REQUIERED FABRIC API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/lYO-zzTzku0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


This mod is currently at version (1.0.0), and I plan to continue adding new features over time. I’ll also aim to update it to future versions of the game, so players can always enjoy The Last Block of Us experience alongside the latest Minecraft features.


![Mod Weapons and clickers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FC6METyN/images/a30e6c7b16b2d8f5d73e4f75605e104ddcf27695.png)


This version 1.0.0 is the first one that is fully playable in survival mode, so that’s why I decided to make it a release version. I plan to design specific structures where players will eventually be able to find the new items, mobs, and blocks during regular gameplay.


![a Clicker in a forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FC6METyN/images/10eb1eef7288c64c9ddf52948df44d6829070095.png)


Current features:

- Natural Mod Mobs spawning
- Clicker and bloater drops the mod items (this is a temporary thing)
- Iconic items from The Last of Us
- Weapons like the shiv and lead pipe
- Molotov cocktail, nail bomb and smoke bomb
- Clicker (fully functional, inspired by the noise and stealth mechanics introduced in Minecraft 1.19 with the Warden)
- Bloater boss (extremely dangerous)

![Mod Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FC6METyN/images/d4b86b8f125348415a7dc4992cee3d537d9c903e.png)
